title: TG EAPCET Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: TG EAPCET Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: TG EAPCET Result 2026 declared for Engineering, Agriculture and Pharmacy streams on the official website - eapcet.tgche.ac.in on 17th May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the TG EAPCET 2026 rank card and scorecard online.

content.text: The Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TGCHE) has officially released the TG EAPCET Result 2026 for Engineering, Agriculture and Pharmacy streams, ending the wait for lakhs of candidates who appeared in this state level entrance exam. The results have been published online for all UG level professional courses covered under the Telangana Engineering, Agriculture and Pharmacy Common Entrance Test conducted by Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH).

TG EAPCET Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - eapcet.tgche.ac.in. Candidates can check and download their TG EAPCET 2026 result, scorecard and rank card by entering their registration number, hall ticket number and date of birth on the official result portal. After downloading the rank card, students are advised to carefully verify their personal details, marks, qualifying status and rank, and contact the exam authorities in case of any discrepancy before the counselling process begins.
The Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TGCHE) has declared the TG EAPCET Result 2026 for Engineering, Agriculture and Pharmacy streams for the 2026-27 academic session.

Candidates can check their TG EAPCET 2026 score, qualifying status and rank card online through the official website eapcet.tgche.ac.in using their registration number, hall ticket number and date of birth.
TG EAPCET Result 2026 has been made available online, and students can use the official direct links to view their scorecard and download the rank card from the TG EAPCET portal.

Candidates who appeared for Engineering, Agriculture and Pharmacy streams can access their TG EAPCET 2026 result using the direct links below and log in with their registration number, hall ticket number and date of birth.

sections.heading: How to Check TG EAPCET Result 2026

items: Visit the official TG EAPCET website at eapcet.tgche.ac.in.
On the homepage, find and click on the link that says "TG EAPCET Result 2026" or "TG EAPCET 2026 Rank Card".
On the login page, enter your TG EAPCET 2026 registration number, hall ticket number and date of birth in the specified fields.
Recheck the entered details and click on the "Submit" or "View Result" button.
Your TG EAPCET Result 2026 scorecard and rank card will be displayed on the screen.
Download the TG EAPCET 2026 rank card and take a printout for counselling and future admission processes.
